Class BaseVectorStoreTests

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.test.vectorstore.BaseVectorStoreTests
public abstract class BaseVectorStoreTests extends Object
Base test class for VectorStore implementations. Provides common test scenarios for delete operations.
Author:
Soby Chacko

    • BaseVectorStoreTests

  • Method Details

    • executeTest

      protected abstract void executeTest(Consumer<VectorStore> testFunction)
      Execute a test function with a configured VectorStore instance. This method is responsible for providing a properly initialized VectorStore within the appropriate Spring application context for testing.
      Parameters:
      testFunction - the consumer that executes test operations on the VectorStore

    • createDocument

      protected Document createDocument(String country, @Nullable Integer year)
